certified_fix.change: Removed inner buffered-input readiness break after multiline mode starts; EOF is handled without turning residual sentinel input into a new prompt.
certified_fix.turn_boundary_source_rejected: transient buffered stdin readiness after continuation lines

known_limitations: Manual terminal multiline entry still depends on entering multiline mode from buffered input detection; this certification addresses phantom reentry after buffered multiline capture starts.
Provider-assisted fallback remains fail-closed by design for unsupported or provider-unavailable prompts.

final_outputs.ROOT_CAUSE: Premature multiline capture termination left sentinel or residual stdin for REPL reentry.
